creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 2.1

Changelog:
	- Allow running unit-tests with 0test. Also, remove hard-coded Python
	  version.
	- Allow releasing using 0release.
	- Fix for Python 2.6: "with" is now a keyword. Reported on ROX web-
	  site.

We need this update to move python 2.6.2 as default version.

Port maintainer (olgeni@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
